# Wheels-only, hash-pinned (the pip-FOD tracer case): both are pure-Python wheels,
# so `pip download --only-binary=:all: --require-hashes` succeeds and assembly is
# pure. Pinned-with-hashes is already lock-grade (ADR 0006c). Generated by:
#    uv pip compile requirements.in --generate-hashes -o requirements.txt
